decision: Made three scoped commits instead of the user's literal 'two (plan, code)': isolated the plan-file-convention fold-back to the shared nc-750 contracts as its own commit, ahead of the plan-docs commit and the code commit.
alternative_not_taken: Folding the contract/doctrine edits into the 'plan' commit to honor the user's two-commit phrasing literally.
rationale: The convention change mutates the constellation's shared contracts (doctrine for all future runs); the plan-docs commit is one initiative's artifacts. Bundling them couples a doctrine change to one feature's plan and makes either commit non-self-contained. The user's intent (separate plan from code) is preserved; the third unit is an honest extra scope.
